channel.title: My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Project

item.title: Introducing Hugo
item.description:
My site is now powered by Hugo

It’s always good to get some historical context. I built the original version of this site with a simple stack: plain HTML, CSS, and JS. Back then, and up to very recently, it had been an extension of my résumé, you know, all that experience, skills, contact info… were given colours and links and what not.

I was happy with it, until there was a need to add more content. Because of the simple nature of the site back then, simply adding anything was a big hassle. I’m not a web developer either, which adds more complexity. Therefore, Hugo comes up as a natural progression, an evolution, to what I had.
